Orange tray with half-eaten Sbarro slice, greasy napkin crumpled beside sweating Orange Julius cup.
Food court table scattered with pretzel salt crystals, abandoned straw wrappers, sticky soda rings.
Arcade entrance glowing purple and blue neon, geometric carpet pattern leading into darkness.
Token machine mounted on wall, coin return cup dangling, cabinet silhouettes visible beyond doorway.
Carpet transition from mall beige to arcade's electric zigzag pattern, bass-heavy sounds echoing out.
Sam Goody window display: cassette towers, Madonna cardboard cutout, listening station headphones hanging.
Musicland interior: rows of CD longboxes, New Releases endcap, price stickers on jewel cases.
Cassette tape wall organized by genre, handwritten staff picks cards clipped to wire racks.
Mall fountain center court, copper pennies layered on turquoise tile bottom, surrounding fern planters.
Fountain bench with wet newspaper section, shopping bags leaning against base, skylight beaming down.
Escalator rising between floors, brass handrails gleaming, potted ficus trees at landing platforms.
Glass elevator shaft overlooking atrium, button panel glowing, terrazzo floor visible three stories below.
JCPenney entrance, perfume counter displays reflecting overhead lights, mannequins in power suits beyond.
Sears auto center entrance, tire advertisements in window, vending machines humming beside doorway.
Department store cosmetics gauntlet, mirrored columns, tester lipsticks scattered on glass counter.
Photo booth curtain hanging open, flash bulb ready, wet photo strips clipped to drying wire.
Spencer's Gifts black light poster section, lava lamp display bubbling, fuzzy handcuffs on pegboard.
Novelty shop window: Magic 8-Balls, rubber masks, oversized dice, neon beer signs stacked high.
Cinnabon counter, frosting smears on glass case, silver tongs resting on wax paper sheets.
Mrs. Fields cookie display, crumbs on counter, empty sample tray, warm air wafting outward.
Neon 'OPEN' sign reflecting on chrome railing, terrazzo floor polished to mirror finish below.
Mall directory kiosk backlit, chrome frame, YOU ARE HERE red dot, cigarette butt in planter.
KB Toys window: action figure boxes stacked in pyramid, He-Man castle playset centerpiece display.
Toy store glass: stuffed animal mountain, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle weapons rack, price tags dangling.
The Gap storefront, folded denim tables visible, white walls, navy blue logo, mannequin torsos.
Limited Too window covered in star decals, scrunchies on display tree, neon windbreakers on hangers.
Skate shop window: Powell Peralta decks mounted vertically, Vans shoe wall, sticker-bombed cash wrap.
Water fountain alcove between storefronts, stainless steel basin dripping, mall directory poster above.
Payphone bank near restroom corridor, receivers hanging, phone book pages torn and dangling.
Restroom hallway: payphones on left, water fountain opposite, terrazzo giving way to tile.
Parking lot at dusk, wood-paneled station wagon beside red Trans Am, orange sky reflected.
Mall entrance from parking lot, glass doors smudged, shopping cart corral, distant fountain visible.
Cookie counter sneeze guard fogged, chocolate chips scattered, cash register drawer slightly open.
Arcade token cup overflowing on machine, quarters jammed in slot, OUT OF ORDER taped sign.
Record store listening station booth, headphones warm, cassette case open, rewind button glowing.
Fountain edge wet from splashing, pennies gleaming underwater, mall muzak speakers hidden in plants.
Escalator comb plate yellow caution strip, gum stuck on rubber handrail, floor transition ahead.
Glass elevator interior: mirrored walls, button panel fingerprinted, atrium reflection passing by.
Department store mannequin grouping, pastel blazers, price tags tucked into sleeves, distant cash wrap.
Photo booth stool worn smooth, coin slot waiting, previous customer's rejected shots in trash.
Spencer's lava lamp shelf, purple and orange wax suspended mid-blob, black light bulbs overhead.
Food court napkin dispenser empty, ketchup pumps, plastic chairs tucked under tables unevenly.
Orange tray abandoned on trash can lid, Chick-fil-A wrapper, waffle fries container tipped over.
Toy store aisle view through window: board game boxes, Barbie dreamhouse, remote control car display.
Clothing store entrance: security sensor towers, stacked sweater table, pop music drifting outward.
Chrome mall railing overlooking lower floor, terrazzo reflecting neon signs from stores below.
Water fountain button pushed in, water still running, wadded paper towel on floor nearby.
Payphone receiver off hook, dial tone humming, graffiti etched into metal cord protector.
Parking lot: faded lines, shopping cart abandoned, brake lights glowing as sun sets behind mall.
Mall atrium skylight casting geometric shadows, chrome fixtures gleaming, distant escalator humming steadily.
